objectives.title: Increase Customer Satisfaction
objectives.description: Improve overall customer experience and loyalty through better service delivery and product quality

keyResults.title: Achieve 90% customer satisfaction score
keyResults.description: Based on monthly NPS surveys and customer feedback

keyResults.title: Reduce customer support response time to under 2 hours
keyResults.description: Average first response time for all support tickets

keyResults.title: Implement customer feedback loop with 95% response rate
keyResults.description: Automated feedback collection after each interaction

objectives.title: Expand Market Reach
objectives.description: Enter new geographic markets and increase brand awareness

keyResults.title: Launch in 3 new international markets
keyResults.description: Complete market entry including localization and partnerships

keyResults.title: Increase brand awareness by 40%
keyResults.description: Measured through aided and unaided brand recognition surveys

objectives.title: Improve Operational Efficiency
objectives.description: Streamline processes and reduce operational costs while maintaining quality

keyResults.title: Reduce operational costs by 15%
keyResults.description: Year-over-year comparison of total operational expenses

keyResults.title: Automate 70% of manual processes
keyResults.description: Implement automation tools for repetitive tasks

keyResults.title: Achieve 99.5% system uptime
keyResults.description: Measured across all critical business systems
